caption: A man in a grey button-down shirt stands in an indoor exhibition space, gesturing toward a white informational poster. The poster features a central green circle with the text "Powerful Chips that Consume Orders of Magnitude less Power," surrounded by blue rectangular labels such as "Substance Abuse," "Oncology," "Food & Cosmetics," "Internal Air Quality," and "Outdoor Exposure." As the scene progresses, the man's hand moves across the poster, pointing toward the various categories and diagrams. In the later frames, the camera pulls back to reveal the man from the chest up, wearing a small identification badge. To his right, another person is partially visible in the background. The setting includes grey partition walls and other exhibit banners, one of which is yellow and black. The man continues to gesture with his right hand while speaking and looking toward the viewer.
